case_title: AHERN RENTALS, INC. VS. 509 CULTURAL CENTER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT.
